zh.lifeSummary: 當John Petitt l於大約1260年出生時，他的父親Sir Michael Petit27歲，母親Amitia l'Arcedekne2歲。他和Amicia L'Arcedekne至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1294年在英國英格蘭享年36歲。

nameMeanings.name: Petitt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Petit
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Alain, Michel, Normand, Mireille, Philippe, Pierre, Achille, Armand, Jean Claude, Jean Jacques, Ketly, Adrien.

French, Walloon, Catalan, English, Jewish (from southern France), West Indian (mainly Haiti), and Mauritian: from (Old) French, Catalan, and Middle English petit ‘small’, hence a nickname for a small man (or an ironic nickname for a big man), or a distinguishing name for the younger of two bearers of the same personal name. Compare Little , Petee , and Petite .

History: Charles Petit from Anneville-Ambourville in Seine-Maritime, France, married Jeanne Rossignol (Martin and Renée Desjardins) in Quebec City, QC, in 1670. Nicolas Petit dit Lapré/Laprée from Le Gué-d'Alleré in Charente-Maritime, France, married Marie Pouponnel in Trois-Rivières, QC, in 1656. Pierre Petit dit Gobin from Lyon in Rhône married Marguerite Véron in Trois-Rivières, QC, in 1692. Pierre Petit dit Saint-Pierre from Évreux in Eure, France, married Judith Miville in Quebec City, QC, in 1758; see also St. Pierre . — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John Petitt l was born about 1260, his father, Sir Michael Petit, was 27 and his mother, Amitia l'Arcedekne, was 2. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Amicia L'Arcedekne. He died about 1294, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Petitt l est né environ 1260, son père, Sir Michael Petit, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Amitia l'Arcedekne, avait 2 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Amicia L'Arcedekne. Il est décédé environ 1294, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Petitt l um 1260 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Michael Petit 27 und seine Mutter Amitia l'Arcedekne 2. Er hatte mit Amicia L'Arcedekne mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1294 im Alter von 36 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Petitt l è nato il circa 1260, il suo padre, Sir Michael Petit, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Amitia l'Arcedekne, aveva 2 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Amicia L'Arcedekne. Morì circa 1294, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Petitt lが約1260年に生まれた時，父Sir Michael Petitは27歳，母Amitia l'Arcedekneは2歳であった。彼はAmicia L'Arcedekneとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1294年にイギリスイギリスで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Petitt l(이)가 대략 1260년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Michael Petit(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Amitia l'Arcedekne(은)는 2세였다. 그는 Amicia L'Arcedekne(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1294년 영국 잉글랜드에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Petitt l nasceu aproximadamente 1260, seu pai, Sir Michael Petit, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Amitia l'Arcedekne, tinha 2 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Amicia L'Arcedekne. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1294, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Petitt l родился около 1260 г., его отцу по имени Sir Michael Petit было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Amitia l'Arcedekne, 2. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Amicia L'Arcedekne. Он умер около 1294 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.
